data.name: Myth of Angels: Prologue
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Myth of Angels: Prologue.


Immerse yourself in the dark world of Myth of Angels: Prologue, where it's the year 2039 and the Heaven has been destroyed. As the unique child of the murdered Creator, you hold the key to restoring peace between angels and humans on planet Earth. As the offspring of the once all-powerful being, the weight of the world lies upon your shoulders. Will you rise above the chaos and strife to bring about peace, or succumb to the allure of the Fallen City?

Along your journey, you will meet a large cast of characters, both allies and enemies. How you interact with them is up to you. You can use your chip for aggression, or choose a different calm approach, or maybe be a good talker and make some panties slip to the ground. The further you go with the story, the more difficult your decisions and situations will be.

This visual novel offers a rich story and backstories of both the characters and events, engaging choices, and a point system so your choices truly matter. Even the smallest choices could impact your story. There are some jumpscares, eerie scenes, and a gorgeous cyberpunk-themed Fallen City filled with neon lights. Come and discover all the secrets!

Gameplay


There is a hidden point system, so try to be smart with your decision-making. Remember, though, that there is no wrong or right choice, as it's your story. However, some choices are harder to unlock than you would expect.

There are various hidden images in the game, and it's completely up to you whether you want to find them or not. I can only recommend collecting them as they're usually spicy images.

There is a fun minigame and freeroam event which is filled with secrets. Oh, you don't like sandbox styled freeroams? Don't worry, I got you covered as it's completely skipable!

After you unlock a lewd scene or find a hidden image, you can rewatch or check in your gallery from the main menu.

With hours of content and multiple branching paths there is much to explore.

data.short_description: Myth of Angels: Prologue is a cyberpunk & angelic themed adult Visual Novel. The game offers action, horror, sex, romance and a rich story. Play as the son of the Creator and face the difficulties of Fallen City.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MAC OS 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon or Intel
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 Compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04 or Kernel 3.x+ distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 Compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
